modules.name: 自动开始(支持X键启停版)
modules.code: (function(){if(window._battleSentry){clearInterval(window._battleSentry);window._battleSentry=null;}if(window._autoStartEnabled===undefined){window._autoStartEnabled=true;}if(window._toggleAutoStartHandler){window.removeEventListener('keydown',window._toggleAutoStartHandler);}window._toggleAutoStartHandler=function(e){if(e.target.tagName==='INPUT'||e.target.tagName==='TEXTAREA')return;if(e.key&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='x'){window._autoStartEnabled=!window._autoStartEnabled;if(window._autoStartEnabled){console.log("%c▶️ [自动开始] 已开启 - 恢复监控","color: #00FF00; font-weight: bold; font-size: 13px;");}else{console.log("%c⏸️ [自动开始] 已暂停 - 停止监控","color: #FF4500; font-weight: bold; font-size: 13px;");}}};window.addEventListener('keydown',window._toggleAutoStartHandler);window._lastStartRequestTime=0;let isRequesting=false;console.log("%c🛡️ 终极开局哨兵 (支持X键启停版) 已启动...","color: #00BFFF; font-weight: bold;");window._battleSentry=setInterval(()=>{if(!window._autoStartEnabled)return;let roomScene=null;let gameScene=null;function findScenes(node){if(!node)return;if(node.roomRoleService&&node.roomRoleService.roleList)roomScene=node;if(node.jiesuan!==undefined&&node.grid)gameScene=node;if(roomScene&&gameScene)return;if(node._children){for(let i=0;i<node._children.length;i++){findScenes(node._children[i]);}}}if(typeof Laya!=='undefined'&&Laya.stage){findScenes(Laya.stage);}if(gameScene||!roomScene||!roomScene.room){window._lastStartRequestTime=0;isRequesting=false;return;}if(isRequesting)return;let myId=roomScene.room.playerId;let roleList=roomScene.roomRoleService.roleList;let hasTeammate=false;let allReady=true;for(let i=0;i<roleList.length;i++){let p=roleList[i];if(p&&p.id&&p.id!==myId){hasTeammate=true;if(!p.isReady){allReady=false;break;}}}if(!hasTeammate||!allReady)return;let now=Date.now();if(now-window._lastStartRequestTime<3000)return;window._lastStartRequestTime=now;isRequesting=true;console.log("%c⚡ 队友已就绪，触发光速开局！","color: #00FF00; font-weight: bold;");if(window.pomelo&&window.pomelo.request){window.pomelo.request("area.roomHandler.readyGame",null,(res)=>{if(res&&res.code===200){console.log("%c✅ 服务器已确认，载入战场中...","color: #00FF00;");}else{console.log("%c❌ 开局失败: "+(res.msg||"状态异常")+"，恢复监控。","color: orange;");window._lastStartRequestTime=0;}isRequesting=false;});}},200);})();
